LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS ARGUED AND THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS IS DENIED BASED ON THE DECISION IN BLAIR V. SUPERIOR COURT (1990) 218 CAL. APP. 3D 221. PLAINTIFF'S NOTICE MADE SPECIFIC REFERENCE TO THE DOOR OF THE BUS CLOSING ON HER LEG. AS A CONSEQUENCE, THE CITY WAS ON NOTICE THAT THE DOOR WAS INVOLVED AS WELL AS THE CONDUCT OF THE DRIVER. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: PATRICK J. MAHONEY, REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR 8600 (302/PJM)

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings, Judicial Notice
Off Calendar Sep-04-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Daniel A. Zaheer, Esq., DEPUTY CITY ATTORNEY, CCSF (415-554-3822), appearing for defendant / moving party City and County of San Francisco
John J. Hughes, Esq. (415-928-4200), appearing for plaintiff / opposing party Woo Ja Im Dhong

Ruling:
DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings is denied based on the decision in Blair v. Superior Court (1990) 218 Cal. App. 3d 221. Plaintiff's notice made specific reference to the door of the bus closing on her leg. As a consequence, the City was on notice that the door was involved as well as the conduct of the driver. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Patrick J. Mahoney, Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR 8600 (302/PJM/VC)

Mtn To Quash Subpoenas Duces Tecum
Off Calendar Jul-30-2008 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance, tentative ruling is adopted. Plaintiff woo Panette's motion to quash or modify the subpoena duces tecum is granted in part. The motion to quash is denied. The subpoena is modified to only require production of records relating to the back and lower extremities from January 1, 2000 to the present. The request for monetary sanctions is denied. Commissioner: Bruce Chan. Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Set For Trial On Jan-05-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Dec-16-08 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 318
